item.title: Visiting Dallas Vintage Toys at the Grand Reopening
My Favorite Halloween Toy of 2019
item.description: 🎃📻🧡

item.title: Autobots
item.description:
See that Transformers insignia on that Corolla? I had that idea. Back in 1986. And now some jerk is getting rich off my idea.

Yep. Putting Transformers insignia on Corollas. All mine.

item.title: The Retro Store in Pasadena, California

A Halloween Run to Toys R Us
A Visit To The Toy Store
